power, and the gamemaster thinks it is too destructive of the game to give the next clone the same power, he may very well decide, in this special case, to give the next clone a dif- ferent power, So don't assume that just because the rules say all clones have the same power that i's necessarily so, 
Paranoia often purposefully blurs the line between the player and his character. However, in many cases, its important to be aware of the differences, and to not let your feelings control your character's actions — or your character's feelings affect the way you treat the ‘other players. Realize that each clone stars off fresh, and don't carry over one clone’s an- tipathies to the next one, Realize that because ‘one players character has betrayed yours is no, reason to get upset at that player — betrayal is all part of the game.
